home.p1: Metaverse is unleashing infinite potential in various aspects, we believed that it would bring us new directions and impart on the development of FinTech. The Chief Executive's 2022 Policy Address indicated that I&T provides key impetus for Hong Kong's high-quality economic development.
home.p2: As a global financial centre with a growing strategic interest in sustainable finance, and a financial hub, which recognised as a leader in digital technologies and innovation, Hong Kong is seeking an improved understanding of how digital finance can accelerate the greening of financial flows. This implies the integration of environmental risks and opportunities into day- to-day financing and investment decisions, as well as the development of financial services and products that make a substantial contribution to environmental objectives. It also involves the use of policy approaches that harness green digital finance applications to realign financial flows towards low-carbon and resource-efficient economies.
home.p3: The FinTech Awards 2022 (hereinafter “Award”), organised by ET Net and held for the sixth year, are aimed at commending best FinTech  practices and recognising outstanding FinTech professionals from Hong Kong-based companies.
home.p4: Our efforts in achieving excellent business performance and sustainable growth have earned widespread recognition in the market.This award is an acknowledgment of our commitment from the industries to maintain outstanding practices in all aspects of FinTech.
